Event: The Quantum Adventure
Event Date: 01/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E15
Unequal Exchange Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit steals 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% spell power from the enemy with the highest spell power for 3 sec and casts a shield on themself and an ally with the lowest current health and absorbs damage of any type for 3 sec. The shield absorbs damage equal to 90% / 91% / 92% / 93% / 95% / 97% / 100% of the unit's spell power.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 8% / 9% / 10% / 11% / 13% / 16% / 20% spell power from 2 enemies with the highest spell power for 3 sec and casts a shield on themself and 2 allies with the lowest current health that absorbs damage of any type for 3 sec. The shield absorbs damage equal to 97% / 98% / 99% / 100% / 103% / 106% / 110% of the unit's spell power.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 13% / 14% / 15% / 16% / 18% / 21% / 25% spell power from 3 enemies with the highest spell power for 3 sec and casts a shield on themself and 3 allies with the lowest current health that absorbs damage of any type for 3 sec. The shield absorbs damage equal to 104% / 105% / 106% / 108% / 111% / 118% / 120% of the unit's spell power.
